intent_tree: {"将MP3音频文件中的语音转换为文字": {"选择并处理一个清晰的MP3音频文件": {}, "将MP3文件转换为WAV格式": {}, "从音频中提取语音并转为文字": {"提高语音识别准确率": {"预处理音频以增强清晰度": {}, "分割长音频以优化分段识别": {}}, "生成结构化输出": {"按标题和正文格式化文本": {}}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "检查输入的MP3文件是否存在"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载MP3文件并转换为WAV格式"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "设置音频参数（如采样率和声道）以确保清晰度"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "导出处理后的音频为WAV文件"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "使用语音识别库加载WAV文件"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "调整环境噪声以提升识别效果"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "调用Google语音识别API进行语音转文字"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "返回识别结果或错误信息"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "清理临时生成的WAV文件"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "对音频进行降噪和音量标准化"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "基于静音检测分割音频"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "逐段加载分割后的音频片段"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "调用Whisper模型进行语音识别"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "合并分段识别结果为完整文本"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "按标题和正文格式化输出文本"}, {"id": "Node16", "description": "保存格式化后的文本到文件"}, {"id": "Node17", "description": "清理分割后的音频片段"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileCheck"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "audioLoad"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "audioExport"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node10", "type": "preprocessStart"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "splitAudio"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "chunkLoad"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "speechRecognition"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "mergeResults"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "formatOutput"}, {"source": "Node15", "target": "Node16", "type": "saveOutput"}, {"source": "Node16", "target": "Node17", "type": "cleanupChunks"}, {"source": "Node17", "target": "Node9", "type": "finalCleanup"}]}
